summary: Iteration 145: Modification Notifications with Email Integration - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs (POST /api/modifications/, GET /api/notifications/counts, GET /api/notifications/unread-ids/modification, POST /api/notifications/mark-read) working correctly. Email integration verified: modification_proposed emails sent via Resend API with status=success. user_notifications created with event_type='modification' and email_sent=True. Scheduler jobs (proposal_expiration_job, modification_vote_reminder_job) registered. Frontend shows Decisions badge, unread indicators, and 'Historique des modifications' section on appointment detail pages.

backend_api_tests.test_notification_counts_includes_modifi: PASS - Returns {decisions: N, disputes: N, modifications: N}
backend_api_tests.test_mark_read_modification_type: PASS - Returns {marked: N} for modification event_type
backend_api_tests.test_create_proposal_triggers_notificati: PASS - Proposal created and notification triggered
backend_api_tests.test_regression_unread_decision_ids: PASS - Unread decision IDs endpoint works
backend_api_tests.test_regression_unread_dispute_ids: PASS - Unread dispute_update IDs endpoint works

code_inspection_tests.test_structural_fields_check: PASS - _apply_proposal checks start_datetime, location, appointment_type, meeting_provider

frontend_tests.unread_indicators: PASS - Blue dot visible on unread cards
frontend_tests.appointment_detail_page: PASS - Star Auto page loads with modification history section

critical_code_review_comments: modification_service.py: _notify_modification_proposed() creates in-app notification + email for all pending voters (lines 934-1015)
modification_service.py: _notify_modification_applied() creates in-app notification for all engaged participants (lines 1018-1070)
modification_service.py: send_modification_vote_reminders() checks 9h-20h Paris time and sends to non-responders (lines 1073-1162)
modification_service.py: _apply_proposal() only sends email for structural changes (start_datetime, location, appointment_type, meeting_provider) (lines 511-519)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Star Auto appointment (270f4c8a-1ef5-4d32-9d4c-c405155f7539)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modification notification system fully implemented and tested. Email integration verified: modification_proposed, modification_proposal, modification_accepted emails all working via Resend API. user_notifications collection has event_type='modification' with email_sent=True. Scheduler jobs (proposal_expiration_job every 5min, modification_vote_reminder_job every 15min) are registered. The vote reminder only sends between 9h-20h Europe/Paris time. Structural fields that trigger email on apply: start_datetime, location, appointment_type, meeting_provider. No dedicated /modifications route exists - modifications are accessed via appointment detail pages with 'Historique des modifications' section. Login route is /signin.

user_notifications_collection.message_format: Modification proposee (date) — votre vote est requis.
